name: eBay Vehicle Parts Compatibility
body:
[{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Parts compatibility allows sellers to show a variety of vehicles that are compatible with a part or accessory in a single listing."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With parts compatibility, you can create one listing describing a single part, and add a complete list of compatible vehicles from more than 37,000 models."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits"}], "data-id": "benefits"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "More potential sales", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Buyers can easily find parts that fit their specific vehicle."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Listings with parts compatibility information appear higher in search results as they are more relevant to the buyer."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Gives customers more confidence that the part will fit the vehicle they are buying."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Less potential cost", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Decreased fees from duplicate listings."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Less time and money spent on returns."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fewer resources are devoted to answering customer questions about whether the part will fit their specific vehicle."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Parts Compatibility"}], "data-id": "set-up-parts-compatibility"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There are various ways to set up eBay parts compatibility, as "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1226-ebay-vehicle-parts-compatibility#epid-in-custom-product-field", "children": [{"text": "ePID in Custom Product Field"}]}, {"text": "[Recommended]", "bold": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Note: This is the recommended method. Also, know that it does not support compatibility notes."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This method tags the vehicles that are compatible with a given SKU by using the Custom Product field to host the list of compatible eBay Product IDs (ePIDs)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow the Steps below:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a Custom Product Field as per the instructions in the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/26-add-and-manage-products", "children": [{"text": "Add and Manage Products"}]}, {"text": " article. Make sure that the "}, {"text": "Field Type is", "bold": true}, {"text": " selected as ""}, {"text": "Text", "bold": true}, {"text": "". Other fields can be filled as per your preference. See the screenshot below as an example:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/J5LAEKOMKTEQ/epid-cpf-step1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/J5LAEKOMKTEQ/epid-cpf-step1.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ePID_CPF_Step1.png", "width": 1592, "height": 1126}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the Listing Rule Template, navigate to the "}, {"text": "Categorisation & Listing Rules", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/A88MQWB3E84J/epid-cpf-step2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/A88MQWB3E84J/epid-cpf-step2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ePID_CPF_Step2.png", "width": 1920, "height": 698}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to locate the "}, {"text": "eBay Compatibility List", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu and select ""}, {"text": "Map to custom product field with comma (,) separated list of ePIDs", "bold": true}, {"text": ""."}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UXJ0K8JLMVMC/epid-cpf-step3.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UXJ0K8JLMVMC/epid-cpf-step3.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ePID_CPF_Step3.png", "width": 1920, "height": 780}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "eBay Compatibility List", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu will only be visible if the selected Fallback Primary Category is compatible with eBay Parts Compatibility."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the dropdown menu, select the Custom Product Field that you created in Step 1."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/AANZG7JMMGBN/epid-cpf-step4.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/AANZG7JMMGBN/epid-cpf-step4.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ePID_CPF_Step4.png", "width": 1274, "height": 606}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the product Edit page of any product associated with the Listing Rule Template, enter a comma-separated list of vehicle ePIDs. The ePIDs can be found in the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.ebay.com.au/help/selling/selling/selling-vehicles-parts-accessories?id=4647#section6", "children": [{"text": "eBay Master Vehicle List (MVL)"}]}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BSR8A7XRATPN/epid-cpf-step5.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BSR8A7XRATPN/epid-cpf-step5.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ePID_CPF_Step5.png", "width": 1016, "height": 670}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The default "ePID for eBay Australia" field visible in the "List to eBay" section refers to Product ePIDs used for "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1080-ebay-product-based-shopping-experience", "children": [{"text": "eBay Product Based Shopping Experience"}]}, {"text": " configuration. It is not suitable to host the vehicle ePIDs."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You may now revise your listings to push the vehicle list to eBay."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "ePID as Content Type"}], "data-id": "epid-as-content-type"}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Warning: Only use this method if compatibility notes are absolutely required. Creating a "content type" tree, that is category tree, may affect webstore performance even if unused on the webstore frontend."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This method tags the vehicles that are compatible with a given SKU by using Content Type to assign ePIDs to the products as a Category."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow the steps below:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a new Content Type with the following settings:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Name: "ePID""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Unique Code: "ePID""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/4ECIQEIOYM9D/epid-ct-step1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/4ECIQEIOYM9D/epid-ct-step1.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ePID_CT_Step1.png", "width": 1434, "height": 522}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Download and open the eBay Master Vehicle List."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Rename the "ePID" column to "Name"."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Delete all other columns."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save the file as a CSV."}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Start the Data Import Wizard. Select "What are you importing?" as "Category or Content" and upload the file created in Step 2."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CY86BZ5DN4GK/epid-ct-step2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CY86BZ5DN4GK/epid-ct-step2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ePID_CT_Step2.png", "width": 1374, "height": 518}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "Continue to Next Step" and on the Field Mapping step, map as below:"}, {"text": "

Then, complete the Import Wizard."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/HS2NYELEYF9P/epid-ct-step3.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/HS2NYELEYF9P/epid-ct-step3.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ePID_CT_Step3.png", "width": 1380, "height": 680}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the Listing Rule Template, navigate to the "}, {"text": "Categorisation & Listing Rules", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab and locate the "}, {"text": "eBay Compatibility List", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/FOTERTFG4P01/epid-ct-step4.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/FOTERTFG4P01/epid-ct-step4.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ePID_CT_Step4.png", "width": 1380, "height": 798}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The "eBay Compatibility List" menu will only be visible if the Fallback Primary Category selected is compatible with eBay Parts Compatibility. "}, {"text": "
Select "}, {"text": "Map to product compatibility List", "bold": true}, {"text": " = "ePID" (the Content Type created on Step 1) and Save."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can now select or import the relevant ePID onto the products. Follow the instructions in "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/26-add-and-manage-products", "children": [{"text": "Add and Manage Products"}]}, {"text": " to add Categories (in this case, "ePID") to products manually or in bulk."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You may now revise your listings to push the vehicle list to eBay."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Make, Model, Submodel"}], "data-id": "make-model-submodel"}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Warning: This is a legacy method and may cause backend and front-end latency."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If your product has data that correlates to the make, model, year, variant, and so on, you can use this to match to an eBay parts compatibility tree. The compatibility tree requires you to map make, model, variant, year, submodel & engine."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create the Category Tree"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Assign Parts Compatibility to Products"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Listing Rules Template"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Create The Category Tree"}], "data-id": "create-the-category-tree"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before you begin to categorise your products, you first need to create a category tree to house the category data."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Setup & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " and choose "}, {"text": "Import eBay Categories", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Import eBay Vehicle Compatibility Categories", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the drop-down menu and click "}, {"text": "Continue", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Choose the "}, {"text": "eBay Category Tree", "bold": true}, {"text": " to download. If you are setting up parts compatibility for the first time, select "}, {"text": "Create A New Category Tree", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Only Insert New Records", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Name the tree "}, {"text": "Parts Compatibility", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "When complete, click "}, {"text": "Import Data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Assign Parts Compatibility To Products"}], "data-id": "assign-parts-compatibility-to-products"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Now that you've created your category structure, you can assign it to your products. There are two methods, individually and in bulk (though export & import)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Individually", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Parts Compatibility can be assigned to products in the same way as product categories. Please follow the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/26-add-and-manage-products#product-category", "children": [{"text": "how to add a product to a product category"}]}, {"text": " instructions, remembering to select "}, {"text": "Parts Compatibility", "bold": true}, {"text": " instead of "}, {"text": "Product Category", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Bulk Method", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To assign parts compatibility to multiple products at once, use the Neto "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/668-product-import-wizard", "children": [{"text": "Import Wizard"}]}, {"text": " to upload a CSV file with your products and the associated compatibility information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Below is an example of how you can structure the layout of the CSV file."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type":
